content.title: First Read Rule
body: If this is the agent's first time reading this README for the current work mission, read the entire README before opening deeper docs, following local routes, or relying on this corpus.

A first full pass is required once per current work mission, after a context reset, after a handoff or resume, or after the task materially changes. It is not required at every checkpoint in the same active mission.

After the first full pass, use the routing sections below to decide which local docs to reread or inspect next. At later checkpoints, reread only route-relevant sections unless the active `.core.*` route, roadmap, audit, or local stop condition requires a broader reread.
Do not treat this README as authority over App Behavior, architecture, implementation plans, proof, source, repo facts, product decisions, or explicit user instruction.
Living Document
Purpose: Index for generated Markdown, script, database, and admin UI compatibility guidance for UX JSON specs.
Audience: Agents and engineers designing generators, validators, DB import/export, or admin UI views for App Behavior specs.
Keep In Sync With: Schema files, examples, and any future generator or DB tooling.
Update When: Generated output rules, storage assumptions, DB document shapes, or admin UI workflows change.
Does Not Cover: Implementation of generator scripts or database migrations.

content.title: Generation And Storage
body: This folder explains how UX JSON should be rendered, stored, split, composed, and presented in tools without losing governance or row identity.
Files are prefixed in recommended reading order.
1. [Generated Markdown Companions](00-generated-markdown-companions.md)
2. [DB Admin UI Compatibility](01-db-admin-ui-compatibility.md)

content.title: Routing
body: Use this area when checking how UX-system artifacts are generated, stored, or made compatible with DB/admin UI workflows.
Route by task:
- Generated Markdown companions: read generation docs before judging generated review artifacts or Markdown outputs.
- DB/admin UI compatibility: read storage and compatibility docs before changing schema-facing or admin-facing artifact expectations.
Generation and storage docs do not create App Behavior truth. They govern representation, generated companions, and storage compatibility for behavior that must come from proper authority.
Stop when the agent can state the generated or stored artifact, the representation/storage rule being applied, the source behavior authority, and the validation needed before claiming compatibility.
